tasks.subject: Task 0: Add author + theme-color meta tags
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `<meta name="author">` and `<meta name="theme-color">` to the `<head>` of index.html.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html` (after `<meta name="robots">`, around line 9)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `<meta name="author" content="Simon Fieber" />` present in head
- [ ] `<meta name="theme-color" content="#4f46e5" />` present in head
- [ ] Both tags appear after `<meta name="robots">` and before `<link rel="icon">`
- [ ] Changes committed

**Verify:** `grep -n "author\|theme-color" /Users/simon/Developer/cutpdf.app/index.html` → 2 lines containing author and theme-color

**Steps:**
- Insert after `<meta name="robots" content="index,follow" />`:
```html
  <meta name="author" content="Simon Fieber" />
  <meta name="theme-color" content="#4f46e5" />
```
- Commit: `git add index.html && git commit -m "feat: add author and theme-color meta tags"`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n 'author|theme-color' index.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["meta name=author content=Simon Fieber present", "meta name=theme-color content=#4f46e5 present", "both after robots meta, before favicon link", "committed"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Generate og-image.png + update og:image tags
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Convert `og-image.svg` to `og-image.png` (1200×630) using the first available CLI tool, commit the PNG, and update og:image + og:image:type + twitter:image tags in index.html to reference the .png.

**Files:**
- Create: `og-image.png`
- Modify: `index.html` (3 og:image tag changes)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `og-image.png` exists at repo root, is valid PNG, 1200×630 px
- [ ] og:image tag references https://cutpdf.fieber-it.com/og-image.png
- [ ] og:image:type tag has content=image/png
- [ ] twitter:image tag references https://cutpdf.fieber-it.com/og-image.png
- [ ] og-image.svg still present (untouched)
- [ ] Both PNG and index.html changes committed

**Verify:** `sips -g pixelWidth -g pixelHeight og-image.png` → pixelWidth: 1200, pixelHeight: 630

**Steps:**
1. Detect tool and generate PNG (fallback: rsvg-convert → inkscape → convert)
2. Verify dimensions with sips
3. Update 3 og:image tags from .svg to .png and image/svg+xml to image/png
4. Commit: `git add og-image.png index.html && git commit -m "feat: add og-image.png, switch og:image tags from SVG to PNG"`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["og-image.png", "index.html"], "verifyCommand": "sips -g pixelWidth -g pixelHeight og-image.png && grep -n 'og-image' index.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["og-image.png is 1200x630 PNG", "og:image references .png not .svg", "og:image:type is image/png", "twitter:image references .png", "og-image.svg still exists", "committed"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
